name: 126mail-cleanup
tagline: Clean up, back up, and optimize your NetEase 126.com email — reclaim gigabytes of cloud storage.
description:
A step-by-step IMAP assistant for NetEase 126.com email accounts. Helps you: (1) create a complete local backup of all emails and attachments with resume support, (2) classify and bulk-delete years of ads, subscriptions, and platform notifications safely, and (3) strip large attachments from the server while keeping lightweight stubs — typically reclaiming 3-5GB of cloud storage.

Every destructive operation has preview, confirmation, staging copy, and verification steps. All operations are resumable. No pip dependencies — uses Python standard library only.

Battle-tested on a 43,000+ email account: 16,900 ads deleted, 70 large emails stripped, 3.4GB reclaimed.
